# Ruksak Harness — Strategy Layer Index

_Generated 2026-06-03. Strategy layer only; delivery verdicts (`delivery:`) are stamped later by the delivery skill._

## Graph tree

- **Vision** — Portable context (and later, portable harnesses) across every agent platform (`vision`) ✅ approved
- **Goals** — Portable context now, portable harnesses later (`goals`) ✅ approved
- **Market** — AI agent memory / context layer market (`market`)
  - Competitors: AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md convention (`comp-agents-md-standard`) · Mem0/OpenMemory (`comp-mem0-openmemory`) · Supermemory (`comp-supermemory`) · ContextPool & file-based peers (`comp-contextpool`)

- **Problem — Context fragmented across per-tool files** (`prob-context-fragmentation`)
  - ▶ Opp: One governed MCP context surface, per-client (`opp-single-mcp-context-surface`) · delivery: unknown
- **Problem — Switching agents loses context, re-explanation** (`prob-cold-start-reexplain`)
  - ▶ Opp: One governed MCP context surface, per-client (`opp-single-mcp-context-surface`) · delivery: unknown
- **Problem — Decisions / the "why" not captured durably** (`prob-decisions-not-captured`)
  - ▶ Opp: First-class decision + reasoning layer (`opp-decision-reasoning-layer`) · delivery: unknown
- **Problem — Unmanaged writes degrade context trust (rot)** (`prob-context-trust-rot`)
  - ▶ Opp: Governed, proposal-backed writes + review queue (`opp-governed-writes-review`) · delivery: unknown
- **Problem — No cross-repo / portfolio rollup** (`prob-cross-repo-portfolio`) ⚠ assumption
  - ▶ Opp: Portfolio rollup → portable-harness substrate (`opp-portable-harness-substrate`) · delivery: unknown

_No solutions or decisions yet — that's the delivery skill's job._
